block_details.reason: TP1 is a PARTIAL close (tp1_close_pct=0.5 per position_manager.py:73). Adding TP1 to _FULL_CLOSE would record a full-close outcome for a still-open trailing position, corrupting all 7 feedback signals.
block_details.correct_fix: Accumulate partial_close_pnl in position object at TP1 hit, pass total P&L (TP1_partial + trailing_close) to record_outcome() at trailing close.

tp1_partial_close_insight.description: TP1+trailing path (all 160 trades) has WR=64% avg=+$10.03. Prior -$0.34 figure was TRAILING_STOP close_reason only (111 losing trades). Framing corrected Run86.
tp1_partial_close_insight.impact: TRAILING_STOP_LOCK still valuable: converts trailing losses to TP2 wins

new_findings_run86.insight_contradiction_triplet: Insights 3, 7, 9 contradict each other on leverage/WR. All ACTIVE. No conflict detection.
new_findings_run86.duration_h_broken: All trades in both CSVs show duration_h<=0. Hold-time rules unvalidatable.
new_findings_run86.btc_long_veto_rec: BTC_LONG WR=32%, inverse confidence effect, all sub-conditions negative. Gate=80% veto recommended.
